title: CrossProfileApps checkCallingOrSelfPermission return value discarded — cross-user queries unprotected
notes: canConfigureInteractAcrossProfiles() and canUserAttemptToConfigureInteractAcrossProfiles() call checkCallingOrSelfPermission(INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS) but DISCARD the return value. Should use enforceCallingOrSelfPermission(). Any app can query cross-user profile configurations, learn package installation status on other profiles, and discover multi-user setup without INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS.
